description_long: This is a small, slender bird with a streamlined body and a long, narrow tail. Its plumage is primarily brown with subtle streaks and mottling, and it has a slightly reddish-brown crown and nape. The wings are short and rounded, while the tail is straight and extends well beyond the body, giving the bird a distinctive elongated profile. The beak is thin, straight, and conical, suitable for picking seeds or insects. The legs are short and appear to be a pale brown or grayish color. The overall appearance suggests a sparrow-like bird commonly found in urban parks, gardens, and streets.
description: A small, brown bird with a long, narrow tail, reddish crown, and streaked plumage, resembling a sparrow. It has a slender, conical beak and short, pale legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long tail, and subtle streaking on the brown plumage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, narrow tail and the symmetry of the wings and back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated profile, with the beak and tail clearly visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the reddish crown, streaked back, and the full length of the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: streaked and mottled with a reddish-brown crown and back
